MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANDIE KATTER, MICHAEL MCGINN's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Reinstate Case.

Plaintiffs Andie Katter and Michael McGinn's motion to set aside dismissal and reinstate case is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for plaintiffs is required to prepare a proposed order that tracks the ruling of the Court and states that the motion was not opposed.
